title: galium palustre var. elongatum
intro: Galium palustre var. elongatum, also known as Elongated Marsh Bedstraw, is a variant of the Galium palustre plant species, a perennial herb native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and relieve symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. The health benefits of Galium palustre var. elongatum include its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help alleviate menstrual cramps, digestive issues, and skin problems. Herbal preparations of Galium palustre var. elongatum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the dried plant material in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
